title: API
excerpt: image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. The `cloudflare` plugin should be included in the Vite `plugins` array: import { cloudflare } from "@cloudflare/vite-plugin"; It accepts an optional `PluginConfig` parameter.
